title: Show only when populated: "Connected Boards" item view widget
excerpt: It would be great if an Item View 'Connect Board" widget could be set to only show results for actual item connections, and not litter the widget with empty board headers for connected boards that the local item is not c…

posts.author: sescott (Steve Escott)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be great if an Item View 'Connect Board" widget could be set to only show results for actual item connections, and not litter the widget with empty board headers for connected boards that the local item is not connected to.

See the attached image - On top is what happens now - I have a connect board column with 7 connected boards, but with only 1 connection in one of those boards. It is crowded with useless headers.

In the bottom image, the boards with no connected items don’t show up in the widget since the new/proposed “Hide Boards with No Connected Items” checkbox is checked.

connected board tile1895×1142 111 KB

I hope this is something that would help others.

Steve Escott
AllDayIT
Authorized monday.com Partner

.
